LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-30-2021 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS' MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. Off Calendar Dec-20-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-30-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS' Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Center for Advanced Public Awareness's unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
